obligation_extraction.obligation: Invoices in a Portuguese SAF-T export must include the customer tax identification number.
Invoices in a Portuguese SAF-T export must include the invoice date.
Invoices in a Portuguese SAF-T export must include the tax code.
Invoices in a Portuguese SAF-T export must include the invoice total.
Customer account reference must be included where applicable.
Records with missing tax identifiers should be corrected before export.
Records with inconsistent totals should be corrected before export.
The product should maintain validation evidence to support user review and audit checks.
The system guarantees full legal compliance automatically after export.
